metadata.title: Censys Add Incident Comment
metadata.description: This playbook is triggered via HTTP request and is designed to be used as a sub-playbook by other Censys playbooks (CensysIncidentEnrichment, CensysEntityEnrichmentHost, CensysEntityEnrichmentCertificate, CensysEntityEnrichmentWebProperty, CensysAlertEnrichment). It receives enrichment data (host, web_property, certificate) along with the incident ARM ID and parent playbook name. The playbook processes each data type, extracts relevant fields (IP, autonomous system, WHOIS, location, DNS, services, threats, vulnerabilities, labels, software), formats them into HTML tables, and adds them as comments to the Microsoft Sentinel incident. It handles comment character limits (splitting into multiple comments if needed) and enforces a maximum of 100 comments per incident. The enrichment data is also ingested into Azure Log Analytics custom tables (Incident_Enrich_Host_Data_CL, Incident_Enrich_WebProperty_Data_CL, Incident_Enrich_Certificate_Data_CL) for historical analysis. The playbook includes comprehensive error handling and returns appropriate HTTP responses.
prerequisites: 1. This playbook is intended to be called as a sub-playbook by other Censys playbooks.
2. Ensure the parent playbook (CensysEnrichment, CensysEntityEnrichmentHost, etc.) is deployed and configured.
3. The Log Analytics workspace must be configured to receive custom logs.
postDeployment: 1. Authorize the Microsoft Sentinel and Log Analytics Data Collector API connections.
2. Configure the parent playbooks to call this sub-playbook using its HTTP trigger URL.
3. Ensure the playbook has appropriate permissions to add comments to incidents.

metadata.description: Name of the Logic App (Playbook) to be deployed. Must be unique within the resource group.

inputs.body: Comment is added to the incident for Enrichment using @{triggerBody()?['parent_playbook']} playbook

inputs.name: html_table_record
inputs.value:
Censys Enrichment For Host: @{item()?['ip']} using @{triggerBody()?['parent_playbook']}
Autonomous System Name: @{coalesce(item()?['autonomous_system_name'],'N/A')}
ASN: @{coalesce(item()?['autonomous_system_asn'],'N/A')}
Whois Network Name: @{coalesce(item()?['whois_network_name'],'N/A')}
Network CIDRs: @{coalesce(item()?['whois_network_cidrs'],'N/A')}
LocationCity: @{coalesce(item()?['location_city'],'N/A')}
Postal Code: @{coalesce(item()?['location_postal_code'],'N/A')}
Province: @{coalesce(item()?['location_province'],'N/A')}
Country: @{coalesce(item()?['location_country'],'N/A')}
Country Code: @{coalesce(item()?['location_country_code_s'],'N/A')}
Continent: @{coalesce(item()?['location_continent'],'N/A')}
Location CoordinatesLatitude: @{coalesce(item()?['location_coordinates_latitude'],'N/A')}
Longitude: @{coalesce(item()?['location_coordinates_longitude'],'N/A')}
Service Count @{coalesce(item()?['service_count'],'N/A')}
DNS names@{coalesce(item()?['dns_names'],'N/A')}
Reverse DNS names@{coalesce(item()?['reverse_dns_names'],'N/A')}
Labels@{coalesce(item()?['labels'],'N/A')}

body.message: Comment limit to an incident has been breached. Censys Enriched data for more entities will be available as part of Incident_Enrich_Data_CL table in the log analytic workspace.

inputs.name: html_table_record
inputs.value:
Censys Enrichment For web property: @{item()?['hostname']} using @{triggerBody()?['parent_playbook']}

Port@{item()?['port']}
Scan Time @{coalesce(item()?['scan_time'],'N/A')}
CertificatesFingerprint SHA256: @{coalesce(item()?['fingerprint_sha256'],'N/A')}
Subject DN: @{coalesce(item()?['subject_dn'],'N/A')}
Issuer DN: @{coalesce(item()?['issuer_dn'],'N/A')}
Subject name: @{coalesce(item()?['subject_common_name'],'N/A')}
Signature self signed: @{coalesce(item()?['signature_self_signed'],'N/A')}
Certificates Validity periodNot before: @{coalesce(item()?['validity_period_not_before'],'N/A')}
Not after: @{coalesce(item()?['validity_period_not_after'],'N/A')}

inputs.body: Unable to add comments to the incident as incident comment count has already reached to 100. Kindly delete previous comments to add new comments or see the more details in the table.

body.message: Comment limit to an incident has been breached.

inputs.body: Error occurred while adding comments to incident. Check Run History of playbook for more details
Incident ID is not available hence comment will not be added
